indicators.name: large open space
indicators.rationale: The open space lacks a dedicated area for focused work, making it difficult to set up a workstation.

indicators.name: glass railings
indicators.rationale: Glass railings obstruct the view and create a sense of separation, which can be distracting for focused work.

indicators.name: low lighting
indicators.rationale: The low lighting conditions make it difficult to see the computer screens clearly, especially in a large open space.

indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface at sitting height to place a laptop or monitor, making it difficult to set up a workstation.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The large open space and glass railings create a sense of separation and distraction, while the low lighting makes it difficult to see the computer screens clearly. There is no flat personal work surface to set up a workstation, making it challenging to focus on computer work in this environment.
